data.title: The Bhutanese government transferred 377.77 BTC, equivalent to $37.28 million, to two unknown wallets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, the Royal Government of Bhutan transferred 377.77 bitcoins to two unknown wallets, worth about 37.28 million US dollars. Currently, the Bhutanese government still holds 11,145 BTC, worth about 1.1 billion US dollars.

data.title: Bhutan Transfers Bitcoin Worth $37.28 Million to Unknown Wallets
data.description: According to Odaily, the government of Bhutan has transferred 377.77 bitcoins, valued at approximately $37.28 million, to two unidentified wallets. Despite this transaction, Bhutan's government still holds 11,145 bitcoins, which are worth around $1.1 billion.

data.title: El Salvador to End Chivo Operations and Bitcoin Legal Tender Status
data.description: According to Odaily, data from the Central Reserve Bank of El Salvador indicates that since October 2024, cryptocurrency remittances have accounted for less than 1% of the total remittance volume to the country. Despite President Nayib Bukele's assertion that traditional financial institutions charge up to 25% in fees for remittances, and the official digital wallet Chivo offering zero fees, cryptocurrency remittances have not gained widespread adoption among the dollarized population of El Salvador. In line with an agreement with the International Monetary Fund (IMF), the Salvadoran government plans to terminate or sell the operations of Chivo and revoke Bitcoin's status as legal tender to reduce its influence in the national economy.

data.title: Justin Sun: Welcome CEX to contact us for cooperation, and we will give you 20% annualized USDD reward
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Sun Yuchen posted on the X platform that he welcomes CEX to contact for cooperation, and will give 20% annualized USDD rewards, and USDT/USDD will be exchanged at a lossless 1:1.
Previously, Sun Yuchen posted that USDD has zero exchange support and relies purely on on-chain traffic. The supply exceeded 100 million in three days after it went online.

data.title: Coinbase International has launched AXS, XTZ and EGLD perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the announcement of Coinbase International Station, the AXS-PERP, XTZ-PERP and EGLD-PERP perpetual contract markets have been fully opened for trading on the Coinbase International Exchange and Coinbase Advanced platforms. Users can now use a variety of order types such as limit orders, market orders, stop orders and limit stop orders for trading.

data.title: El Salvador’s official crypto remittance amount is less than 1% of the total remittance amount
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to data from the Reserve Bank of El Salvador, the amount of remittances to the country using cryptocurrencies has accounted for less than 1% of the total amount since October 2024. Its president Nayib Bukele once said that traditional financial institutions charge up to 25% in fees for remittances, while the official digital wallet Chivo can achieve zero fees, but cryptocurrency remittances have failed to gain widespread adoption among the country's dollarized population. Under an agreement with the International Monetary Fund (IMF), the Salvadoran government will terminate or sell Chivo's operations and cancel Bitcoin's legal tender status to reduce Bitcoin's share in its economy.

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-02-06)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $3.22T, down by -0.06% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $96,155 and $99,149 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $98,460, up by 0.69%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading mixed. Market outperformers include QI, STPT, and LAZIO, up by 26%, 12%, and 11%, respectively.

Top stories of the day:

Bitcoin's Negative Funding Rate Suggests Potential Bullish Reversal

Bitcoin Miners' Revenue Surges 41% to $3.7 Billion Amid BTC Price Boom

data.title: Trivago Partners with Travala to Enable Crypto Payments
data.description:
With this partnership, Trivago users now have the option to pay for their stays using BTC and ETH. They can also use dozens of other cryptocurrencies. This move opens the door to a new way of booking travel. It makes it easier for crypto enthusiasts to use their digital assets for real-world experiences that accept […]
The post Trivago Partners with Travala to Enable Crypto Payments appeared...
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/trivago-partners-with-travala-to-enable-crypto-payments/

data.title: Cboe BZX Moves To List Ethereum ETF Options Amid Rising Demand
data.description:
Cboe BZX Exchange has proposed an amendment to Rule 19.3 to allow the listing and trading of options on spot Ethereum ETF. The move follows a similar filing by NYSE American, which is pending approval by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. The proposal aims to provide investors with additional trading instruments as trading volume […]
The post Cboe BZX Moves To List Ethereum ETF...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/06/cboe-bzx-moves-to-list-ethereum-etf-options-amid-rising-demand/
